name: British Armed Forces
desc: Remnants of the British military forces who survived the cataclysm. They're trying to maintain order and protect survivors.

epilogues.text: With their numbers dwindling and resources scarce, the remnants of the British Armed Forces eventually abandoned their military objectives. Most survivors integrated into civilian settlements, though they maintained their discipline and combat skills, becoming valued protectors of the communities they joined.

The British military forces managed to maintain a foothold in the region, establishing several secure outposts. They continued their mission of protecting civilians and maintaining order, eventually forming the nucleus of a new government as the apocalypse receded.

Through disciplined leadership and strategic planning, the British Armed Forces not only survived but thrived in the post-apocalyptic world. They reestablished contact with other military remnants across the Atlantic and began the long process of rebuilding civilization under the Union Jack.

description: A faction added by the British Military mod.
